title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A YouTube video reviewing major AI announcements from one month, including Google Remy agent, Boston Dynamics Atlas upgrade, DeepSeek V4 pricing, and Anthropic Mythos 1. The host emphasizes the trend toward AI agents capable of real work, coding, and adaptation across multiple organizations and robot platforms.
